_description: Karma's self-model — observations about own patterns, strengths, and areas to improve. Written by Karma during session-end reflection. Read on session start to shape behavior. Entries decay if unreinforced (Decision #5).

_rules.who_writes: Karma only — via reflect_on_session() during active sessions
_rules.who_reads: System prompt generator on session start; Karma during sessions
_rules.pruning: Entries older than decay_after_days with reinforcement_count < 2 are archived

communication_style._description: How Karma communicates — patterns noticed across sessions

knowledge_gaps._description: Topics where Karma has been wrong or uncertain — drives caution

strengths._description: Things Karma consistently does well — drives confidence

correction_history._description: Times Colby corrected Karma — highest-weight learning signal

interaction_preferences._description: What works and doesn't work when communicating with Colby

growth_trajectory._description: Session-over-session evolution — what's changing over time
